shopping_list.title: Shopping lists
shopping_list.empty_description: Go to your daily nutrition plan and tap "Add to shopping list"

settings.title: Customize your products
settings.description: Remove products you don't like to personalize your plan. We'll ask you to review this each phase in your first cycle. You can edit the list in Settings.

products.title: Nutrients focus for today
products.todays_list_description: Adding these products to your shopping list helps you stay on track with nutrients during this phase.
products.supplements_description: Use them if you couldn't fully rely on food today.
products.dosages_note: Dosages are based on evidence-based protocols. Learn more
products.food_varies_description: No tracking required — use this as a flexible guideline based on how many recommended products you eat.
products.disclaimer: This app is not a medical device and does not provide diagnoses. These recommendations are based on published research and general wellness practices. Always consult your healthcare provider before starting new supplements or making significant lifestyle changes.

slide4.title: Histamine sensitivity
slide4.para1: Estrogen can increase histamine and slow its breakdown — which may worsen pain, bloating, headaches, or nausea
slide4.tip1: Around these days, consider limiting aged cheese, fermented foods, smoked meats, alcohol

slide5.title: Nutrition tips

slide5.tip2: Get potassium from baked vegetables, zucchini, and bananas, avoid citrus juices
slide5.tip3: Choose whole foods – meat instead of deli, yogurt instead of “fitness” snacks.

step4.title: Additional symptoms
step4.subtitle: Select all relevant
step4.note_hirsutism_def: - excessive growth of dark, coarse hair on the face, chest, or back;
step4.note_alopecia_def: - female pattern hair loss, thinning of hair on the top and crown of the head;
step4.note_acanthosis_def: - darkened, velvety patches of skin in folds like neck or armpits.
